issues.detail: Skill does not cover error scenarios such as missing subscription or network failures.
Skill contains verbose sections that could be trimmed for brevity.
Skill is specific to GitHub Copilot and VS Code, not generic across AI agents.

scenarios.name: Install Copilot via CLI and configure per-language enablement
scenarios.rationale: Both install both extensions via code --install-extension and configure github.copilot.enable for yaml/markdown/plaintext; treatment adds inline suggest count and cycle shortcuts.

scenarios.name: Cross-file codebase questions with @workspace
scenarios.rationale: Both recommend @workspace, give matching prompts, and explain project-wide indexing; treatment also covers @terminal/@vscode agents and gh copilot CLI.
